title: Monitor and operate water treatment processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor and operate water treatment processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for work

pcs.text: Interpret work plans and identify potential hazards and risks and safe working practices to manage risks, and clarify with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret work plans and identify potential hazards and risks and safe working practices to manage risks, and clarify with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use required tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operations.
